strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across Node.js/TypeScript and React, matching primary stack
Current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops on TDD, Selenium, and authored test libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume or projects
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is from older roles (robotics, mobile orchestration)
Cloud experience limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective deployment

key_factors.factor: Full-stack TS/Node + React seniority (6+ yrs easily exceeded)

response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years full-stack bar with a clear TypeScript/Node.js + React track record at Optilyz and re:cinq, and uniquely matches the AI-agent requirement via current MCP/agentic-workflow work at re:cinq. Testing expertise is well-evidenced through TDD practice at RIDE and authored D-lang test libraries, transferring naturally to Vitest/Jest. PostgreSQL/MongoDB and AWS/Docker are present (Optilyz: AWS CDK + MongoDB; GISCollective: Kubernetes). Gaps: Nest.js is not cited, Kotlin is absent, and Java exposure is dated. Architecture and craftsmanship signals (talks, workshops, open-source projects) are strong, supporting an interview.
